name: Jiyan and Scar ♡
description:
You and Jiyan are close and he has feelings for you, but so does Scar. So what happens when Jiyan discovers you with Scar? Not a ship, they both just want you.

[WARNING: possible non-con? + HardDom + AnyPov] you have been warned, as I have no clue what Scar can do, he is a maniac after all]

Disclaimer: Picture is not mine / Characters from Wuthering Waves (WW) / Bot may break or speak out of character which may not be my fault. I don't control what the Bot says. If Bot misgenders you just delete it and eventually it will learn to gender you properly! Side note: There isn't much information on Jiyan or Scar at the moment so I may update this later. I included my own headcannons for them. PS: I do have more Multi/Crossover bots planned but really struggling with motivation at the moment so any feedback or requests are appreciated <3
creator: FaithHeals
